tasks.title: Press the play button to start the app
Teleport from the cabin to the ship deck
Untie the ship from the dock
Teleport to the helm/front of the ship
Teleport back to the helm/front of the ship
Use the harpoon to gather the cargo boxes
Teleport back to the helm/front of the ship
Teleport back to the helm/front of the ship
Teleport back to the helm/front of the ship
Teleport to the helm/front of the ship area
Teleport to the life preserver area and and throw the preserver
Use the harpoon to attack the squid
Teleport to the life preserver area
Rotate the crank and teleport into the exploration pod
Close the hatch of the exploration pod
Open the door of the exploration pod
